title: 26/01/2026 SIDBI commemorated the 77th Republic Day with the hoisting of the National Flag by CMD, SIDBI, in the presence of the SIDBI family, marking the occasion with collective participation. The o
description: 26/01/2026 SIDBI commemorated the 77th Republic Day with the hoisting of the National Flag by CMD, SIDBI, in the presence of the SIDBI family, marking the occasion with collective participation. The occasion reflected the true spirit of the Republic- unity, responsibility, and unwavering commitment to the constitutional values that guide our nation. Addressing the gathering, CMD, SIDBI highlighted the pivotal role of MSMEs as the backbone of India’s economy and reaffirmed SIDBI’s steadfast commi
